instruction: Write a FreeMarker template that groups `tasks` by string `status` without a hash built-in helper: iterate tasks and emit a heading each time the status changes, listing task titles beneath. Escape titles and status labels.
code:
<#-- Model: tasks: sequence of maps { title, status } sorted by status --> <#assign previousStatus = ""> <#list tasks![] as task> <#if task.status!"" != previousStatus> <#if previousStatus?has_content>

${task.status?html}

    <#assign previousStatus = task.status!"">
  • ${task.title?html}
    • <#if !task?has_next>
